name: Avatar Pipeline — Full NPC Character Creation
description: Creates a complete humanoid NPC with backstory, portrait, 3D mesh, voice, theme music, and Bevy ECS entity

inputs.concept: A grizzled steam engineer who maintains the Iron Road locomotive fleet

steps.name: Write Character Sheet
steps.prompt: Create a complete NPC character sheet for: {concept}. Include: name, age, backstory (3 paragraphs), personality traits, visual description (detailed for image generation), voice description, theme music mood, 3 sample dialogue lines. Output as JSON.

params.prompt: {character.visual_description}, {style} aesthetic, character portrait, detailed face, upper body
params.negative: blurry, low quality, distorted, watermark, text, multiple people

steps.name: Mistral Vision Evaluation
steps.prompt: Evaluate this character portrait against the description: {character.visual_description}. Score 1-10 on: accuracy, quality, style consistency. If score < 7, suggest specific refinements.

steps.name: Generate Bevy ECS Entity Definition
steps.prompt: Generate a Rust Bevy ECS entity definition for NPC '{character.name}'. Include: Transform, mesh handle (model.glb), audio source (theme.wav), dialogue component with {character.dialogue_lines}, personality traits as components. Use Bevy 0.18 API.

params.prompt: {character.visual_description}, walking toward camera, {style} environment, cinematic lighting

steps.name: Package Avatar
steps.command: mkdir -p {output_dir}/{character.name} && cp character.json portrait.png model.glb theme.wav voice_sample.wav entity.rs presentation.mp4 {output_dir}/{character.name}/ 2>/dev/null; echo 'Avatar packaged: {output_dir}/{character.name}'
